## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/EveTogether/EveTogether/blob/main/AGENTS.md) and [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/EveTogether/EveTogether/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md), and this change follows them.
- [ ] I reviewed this change myself — it is not unverified AI output.
- [ ] `make build` is clean (0 warnings) and `make test` passes.
- [ ] New behaviour has tests; a bug fix has a test that fails without it.
- [ ] No secrets in the diff; all source is English.
